text:
(In reply to Alex S from comment #23)

The Quake 2 demo test:
https://www.mediafire.com/file/he1z3ykyk5zt68n/wine-quake-2-demo.mp4/file

In short:
- graphics (in SOFTWARE) seem to work (but sometimes jerky)
- sound is broken and jerky (as you can hear)

When I change VIDEO settings from SOFTWARE to DEFAULT OPENGL it hangs.
